2026-04-16 11:49:00.850 +07:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (101ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT `t0`.`Key` AS `Status`, COUNT(*) AS `Count`
FROM (
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN `t`.`shipStatus` = 'Đã giao' THEN 'delivered'
        WHEN `t`.`tripID` IS NULL OR (`t`.`tripID` = '') THEN 'pending'
        ELSE 'shipped'
    END AS `Key`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE (`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)
) AS `t0`
GROUP BY `t0`.`Key`

SELECT `t`.`orderID`, `t`.`amount`, `t`.`createdAt`, `t`.`ct`, `t`.`isDeleted`, `t`.`itemName`, `t`.`note`, `t`.`receiveDate`, `t`.`receiveStation`, `t`.`receiverName`, `t`.`receiverPhone`, `t`.`sendStation`, `t`.`senderName`, `t`.`senderPhone`, `t`.`shiftID`, `t`.`shipStatus`, `t`.`staffInput`, `t`.`staffReceive`, `t`.`tr`, `t`.`tripID`
FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
WHERE ((`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)) AND ((((`t`.`staffReceive` = @__shift_StaffId_0) AND (`t`.`shipStatus` = 'Đã giao')) AND (`t`.`createdAt` >= @__shift_StartTime_1)) AND (`t`.`createdAt` <= @__shift_EndTime_2))
2026-04-16 12:47:40.222 +07:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (92ms) [Parameters=[@__id_0='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT `t`.`tripID`, `t`.`assistantName`, `t`.`createdAt`, `t`.`departure`, `t`.`departureTime`, `t`.`destination`, `t`.`driverName`, `t`.`notes`, `t`.`shiftID`, `t`.`staffCreated`, `t`.`status`, `t`.`tripType`, `t`.`truckID`, `t0`.`truckID`, `t0`.`driverName`, `t0`.`driverPhone`, `t0`.`licensePlate`, `t0`.`notes`, `t0`.`status`
FROM `tblTrips` AS `t`

SELECT `t`.`shiftID`, `t`.`endTime`, `t`.`staffID`, `t`.`startTime`, `t`.`status`, `t0`.`userID`, `t0`.`createdAt`, `t0`.`email`, `t0`.`fullName`, `t0`.`password`, `t0`.`phone`, `t0`.`roleID`, `t0`.`stationID`, `t0`.`status`, `t0`.`username`
FROM `tblWorkShifts` AS `t`
INNER JOIN `tblUsers` AS `t0` ON `t`.`staffID` = `t0`.`userID`
WHERE `t`.`shiftID` = @__id_0

SELECT `t`.`orderID`, `t`.`amount`, `t`.`createdAt`, `t`.`ct`, `t`.`isDeleted`, `t`.`itemName`, `t`.`note`, `t`.`receiveDate`, `t`.`receiveStation`, `t`.`receiverName`, `t`.`receiverPhone`, `t`.`sendStation`, `t`.`senderName`, `t`.`senderPhone`, `t`.`shiftID`, `t`.`shipStatus`, `t`.`staffInput`, `t`.`staffReceive`, `t`.`tr`, `t`.`tripID`
FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`

2026-04-16 12:47:43.030 +07:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (93ms) [Parameters=[@__today_0='?' (DbType = DateTime), @__tomorrow_1='?' (DbType = DateTime)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(`t`.`tr`, 0.0) + COALESCE(`t`.`ct`, 0.0)), 0.0)
FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
WHERE ((`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)) AND ((((`t`.`createdAt` >= @__today_0) AND (`t`.`createdAt` < @__tomorrow_1)) AND (`t`.`shipStatus` = 'Đã giao')) AND ((`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)))

) AS `t0`

SELECT `t0`.`Key` AS `Status`, COUNT(*) AS `Count`
FROM (
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN `t`.`shipStatus` = 'Đã giao' THEN 'delivered'
        WHEN `t`.`tripID` IS NULL OR (`t`.`tripID` = '') THEN 'pending'
        ELSE 'shipped'
    END AS `Key`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE (`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)
) AS `t0`
GROUP BY `t0`.`Key`

SELECT `t0`.`Key` AS `Status`, COUNT(*) AS `Count`
FROM (
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN `t`.`shipStatus` = 'Đã giao' THEN 'delivered'
        WHEN `t`.`tripID` IS NULL OR (`t`.`tripID` = '') THEN 'pending'

) AS `t0`

SELECT `t0`.`Key` AS `Status`, COUNT(*) AS `Count`
FROM (
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN `t`.`shipStatus` = 'Đã giao' THEN 'delivered'
        WHEN `t`.`tripID` IS NULL OR (`t`.`tripID` = '') THEN 'pending'
        ELSE 'shipped'
    END AS `Key`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE (`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)
) AS `t0`
GROUP BY `t0`.`Key`

SELECT `t0`.`Key` AS `Status`, COUNT(*) AS `Count`
FROM (
    SELECT CASE
        WHEN `t`.`shipStatus` = 'Đã giao' THEN 'delivered'
        WHEN `t`.`tripID` IS NULL OR (`t`.`tripID` = '') THEN 'pending'
        ELSE 'shipped'
    END AS `Key`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE (`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)
) AS `t0`
GROUP BY `t0`.`Key`

INNER JOIN `tblUsers` AS `t0` ON `t1`.`staffID` = `t0`.`userID`
ORDER BY `t1`.`startTime` DESC
2026-04-16 13:18:49.715 +07:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (109ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT `t`.`shiftID` AS `ShiftId`, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(`t`.`tr`, 0.0) + COALESCE(`t`.`ct`, 0.0)), 0.0) AS `Total`
FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
WHERE ((`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)) AND ((`t`.`shiftID` IS NOT NULL AND `t`.`shiftID` IN (11, 7, 6, 2)) AND (`t`.`shipStatus` = 'Đã giao'))
GROUP BY `t`.`shiftID`
